svg.aria-label: Proportional control three ways. Left: the control law, command equals gain times error, drawn as a spring pulling the platform to target. Centre: step responses - low gain rises slowly and smoothly, medium gain about 0.15 rises fast with small overshoot and settles, high gain about 0.4 overshoots massively and rings, exciting the 12 Hz oil spring. Right: settling time falls as gain rises and droop falls as gain rises, with a shaded resonance-limit forbidden zone at high gain. Usable window Kp about 0.1 to 0.15.
svg.text: One knob: raise the gain for speed and tightness — until the oil spring sets the ceiling.
Usable window: Kₚ ≈ 0.1–0.15 — τ ≈ 0.08 s, droop ≈ 0.24 mm, well below the ~12 Hz resonance
